MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-02-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KAREN CARNEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS BASED ON NOT BEING SERVED, BUT THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT SHE WAS SERVED PERSONALLY BUT FAILED TO DO ANYTHING IN RESPONSE UNTIL THE EVE OF EVICTION. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CARNEY, KAREN

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT KAREN CARNEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS BASED ON NOT BEING SERVED, BUT THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT SHE WAS SERVED PERSONALLY BUT FAILED TO DO ANYTHING IN RESPONSE UNTIL THE EVE OF EVICTION.
